user_query:
I want to set up the research scaffolding for a daily crypto momentum strategy and get the signal test code ready before any backtesting. Please read the following inputs and then produce the specified outputs.

Inputs to read (all under input/):
- input/hypothesis_seed.txt — my raw answers to the 5 hypothesis questions (edge, mechanism, counterparty, regime dependency, holding period)
- input/signal.json — signal parameters (name, exact calculation, asset, test period, forward horizons, and how many signals/variations we’ve tested so far)
- input/transaction_costs.yaml — parameters for the transaction cost budget (commission bps, bid-ask spread bps, expected position size in USD, and ADV in USD)

What to create (all under output/):
1) Write a hypothesis file at output/algo-builder/hypotheses/crypto_momo_btc.md using the hypothesis template. Fill each field from input/hypothesis_seed.txt. Set "Trials so far" to (n_trials_so_far from input/signal.json + 1) to account for this planned test, and set "Status: HYPOTHESIS".

2) Create the signal testing script at output/algo-builder/scripts/test_signal.py implementing these functions: compute_ic (Spearman rank correlation IC with t-stat and p-value), compute_icir (ICIR from rolling IC), test_ic_decay (IC across multiple forward horizons), test_ic_stability (rolling IC), and test_ic_by_regime (IC by regime). Include clear docstrings and use Spearman correlation explicitly.

3) Prepare a signal test plan at output/algo-builder/signals/btc_5d_momo_z.md that includes: (a) the exact signal definition from input/signal.json, (b) the test period and forward horizons, (c) the gate criteria listing p < 0.05, IC > 0.02, ICIR > 0.5, positive IC in at least 55% of rolling windows, and evidence in at least one market regime, and (d) a note acknowledging the multiple-testing risk using the current trial count from input/signal.json.

4) Draft a full strategy specification at output/algo-builder/strategies/crypto_momo_btc.md covering: Entry logic, Exit logic (signal-based, time-based, stop loss, take profit), Position sizing, Risk controls, Transaction Cost Budget, and Capacity check. In the Transaction Cost Budget section, pull commission and spread directly from input/transaction_costs.yaml and compute a market impact estimate using the rule 8bps × (position_size / ADV)^0.5 with the provided inputs, then sum to a Total TC. Keep this as a planning document only (do not run a backtest yet).

Please keep all paths relative, use only the specified output/ locations, and do not produce any files outside output/.
